title: EVgo First Quarter 2024 Earnings: Beats Expectations
text: EVgo exceeded analyst expectations in its Q1 2024 earnings report. The electric vehicle charging company reported revenue of $55.2 million, representing a substantial 118% increase compared to the same quarter in 2023. The company's net loss improved significantly to $9.83 million, narrowing by 24% year-over-year. Loss per share reached $0.094, a considerable improvement from the $0.18 loss recorded in Q1 2023. EVgo's financial performance surpassed market predictions on both top and bottom lines. Revenue exceeded analyst estimates by 3.4% and earnings per share significantly outperformed forecasts by 38%. Analysts project the company's revenue will expand at an average annual rate of 27% over the next three years—substantially higher than the broader Specialty Retail industry's anticipated 4.9% growth rate. Despite the positive earnings results, EVgo's share price declined modestly, dropping 1.1% over the preceding week.
